inputs.label: Rate Constant (k)
inputs.businessContext: Reaction rate constant, units depend on reaction order

inputs.label: Reaction Order (n)
inputs.businessContext: Order of the reaction with respect to A (0, 1, or 2)

formulas.finalConcentration: reactionOrder == 0 ? (initialConcentration - rateConstant * time) : reactionOrder == 1 ? (initialConcentration * Math.exp(-rateConstant * time)) : (1 / (1/initialConcentration + rateConstant * time))
formulas.linearPlotValue: reactionOrder == 0 ? (initialConcentration - rateConstant * time) : reactionOrder == 1 ? (Math.log(initialConcentration) - rateConstant * time) : (1/initialConcentration + rateConstant * time)
formulas.formulaText: 'Order ' + reactionOrder + ': ' + (reactionOrder == 0 ? '[A] = [A]₀ - kt = ' + initialConcentration + ' - ' + rateConstant + ' * ' + time + ' = ' + (initialConcentration - rateConstant * time) : reactionOrder == 1 ? 'ln([A]/[A]₀) = -kt, [A] = [A]₀e^(-kt) = ' + initialConcentration + ' * e^(-' + rateConstant + ' * ' + time + ') = ' + (initialConcentration * Math.exp(-rateConstant * time)) : '1/[A] = 1/[A]₀ + kt = 1/' + initialConcentration + ' + ' + rateConstant + ' * ' + time + ' = ' + (1/(1/initialConcentration + rateConstant * time)))
